human_leverage.summary: The loopback console now makes the synthetic housefile, public grant lifecycle, bounded ledger, and simulated interlock state reviewable through one owner-authenticated UI; human visual approval is still required.

blocked_claims: human visual approval or submission-ready polish
browser storage, URL, cookie, screenshot, log, or build-artifact persistence of owner or grant credentials
wildcard CORS or authorization of a foreign browser origin
public, LAN, hosted, or production deployment
live GPT-5.6 response quality, cost, latency, or token use
running API use of a materialized housefile
robot command relay, device motion, physical hardware stop, or certified safety
